taxonomy: Cylindrolobus khasianus is classified as a species of liverwort, a non-vascular plant that belongs to the phylum Marchantiophyta. It is a part of the family Cylindrolobaceae, which is a family of liverworts. This classification places Cylindrolobus khasianus within the larger group of bryophytes, which are non-vascular plants that typically thrive in moist environments. Within the phylum Marchantiophyta, Cylindrolobus khasianus is grouped with other liverworts that share similar characteristics and growth habits. Further research into the specific classification of Cylindrolobus khasianus may be necessary to confirm its exact position within the plant kingdom.
